introSection: Timber Ride was a steel kiddie roller coaster previously located at Legoland Billund in Billund, Syddanmark, Denmark

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The train was designed to resemble a bundle of logs.

fullText:
Timber Ride was a steel kiddie roller coaster previously located at Legoland Billund in Billund, Syddanmark, Denmark



Green track and supports.

The train was designed to resemble a bundle of logs.
